strengths: Demonstrated proper traction setup with Maryland forceps positioning
Maintained steady cutting progression around most of the circle
Showed good instrument coordination during the cutting phases
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full circle cut, leaving the gauze piece attached
Did not verify complete separation before finishing the task
May have rushed the final portion without ensuring thorough completion

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing between each quarter to verify progress and completion.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the full circle cut.

drills.name: Completion verification drill
drills.description: Practice lifting and checking the cut piece at multiple points during cutting to ensure complete separation before declaring the task finished.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not verify complete separation before finishing.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid cutting technique into complete task execution. Always verify full separation of the target piece before considering the task finished.
